subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath created all beings for their ascent unto the heaven of His knowledge and hath commanded them to unite for the exaltation of His Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من خلق الخلق للارتقاء الی سماء عرفانه و امرهم بالاتحاد لاعلاء کلمته و
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @suffering and imprisonment, @consultation
